name: homebrew
description: CI-gated GitHub release workflow for Homebrew-distributed projects: SemVer version selection, release notes, optional GoReleaser, tag publishing, release verification.

interface.shortDescription: CI-gated GitHub releases for Homebrew-distributed projects
interface.longDescription: Release workflow for GitHub projects distributed through Homebrew. Gates releases on green main CI, selects the next SemVer version from app-visible changes, writes release notes, publishes annotated tags, drives optional GoReleaser automation, and verifies the resulting GitHub Release and Homebrew tap.
defaultPrompt: Use $release to cut a CI-gated GitHub release from main.
